characters.name: Akeginu
characters.description: AkeginuNinja StatsGender:FemaleSpecial Ability:Secrete and Project her own BloodStatus:Killed byKagerōAffiliation:Iga TsubagakureClanFamily:UnknownAppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 2First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Misa WatanabeEnglish:Jennifer SemanImage Gallery Akeginu(朱絹) is the bodyguard andconfidantof PrincessOboro, a member of theIga Tsubagakureclan and one of the ten ninja picked byOgento participate in the battle against theKōga Manjidaniclan. Akeginu's full body and facial expressions Akeginu is a rather caring and compassionate woman who seems to truly care for her comrades. As the bodyguard and confidant of PrincessOboro, Akeginu is more forgiving of Oboro's lack of ninja skills than the rest of their clan, caring for her almost as an older sister. Regardless, her first loyalty is to the whole of Iga. So when word of theHattoritruce's cancellation reaches her, Akeginu holds no reservations about deceiving Oboro while aiding her comrades in their attempt to assassinate theKōga Ten- including Oboro's loverGennosuke Kōga. Akeginu is not afraid to use her sexuality when it comes to battle as shown when she leadJōsuke Udonointo a false sense of security before striking with her technique.

characters.name: Gennosuke Kōga
characters.description: Gennosuke KōgaNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:DōjutsuStatus:Commits SuicideAffiliation:Kōga ManjidaniClanFamily:Danjō Kōga(Grandfather)Hyōma Muroga(Maternal Uncle)Unnamed Deceased MotherKagerō(Cousin)Hachirō Kōga(Son)Hibiki Iga(Daughter)AppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 1First Appearance (Anime):Episode 1Voice ActorsJapanese:Kosuke ToriumiEnglish:Troy BakerImage Gallery Hyōma Muroga(Maternal Uncle)Unnamed Deceased MotherKagerō(Cousin)Hachirō Kōga(Son)Hibiki Iga(Daughter) Gennosuke Kōga(甲賀 弦之介,Kōga Gennosuke) is the heir ofDanjō Kōgaand therefore heir to theKōga Manjidaniwhere he is one of the ten Kōga ninja picked by his grandfather to represent the Kōga in the battle against theIga Tsubagakureclan and the fiancé ofOboro, the princess of the Iga clan. In many ways, Gennosuke is as much an oddity among his clan asOborois amongst hers; an idealist and a scholar who believes in looking to the future instead of being dominated by the past, Gennosuke views the pursuit of any grudge to be an ultimately pointless and self-destructive practice. His sense of principles remain even after learning of the renewed conflict betweenKōga ManjidaniandIga Tsubagakure, prompting him to lead the Kōga on an expedition to Sunpu to plead with former ShogunIeyasu TokugawaandHanzō Hattori the 4thto reinstigate the treaty before any more senseless bloodshed occurs. However, despite being a man of peace, Gennosuke is more than capable of killing anyone who threatens him or his clansmen should he be pushed into a corner.

characters.name: Hotarubi
characters.description: HotarubiNinja StatsGender:FemaleSpecial Ability:Summon a Swarm of Butterflies/Spiritual Link with Pet ViperStatus:Killed bySaemon KisaragiAffiliation:Iga TsubagakureClanFamily:UnknownAppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 2First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Miyuki SawashiroEnglish:Colleen ClinkenbeardImage Gallery Hotarubi(蛍火) is a member of theIga Tsubagakureclan who is one of the ten ninja picked byOgento participate in the battle against theKōga Manjidaniclan and the fiancée of fellow Iga ninja,Yashamaru. Hotarubi's full body and facial expressions Hotarubi puts on a very serious and no-nonsense front when with other members of theIga Tsubagakureclan, but she is rather different when alone withYashamaru, appearing to be quite innocent and slightly child-like with her jealous temper tantrums. Although she shares her clan's hatred for theKōga Manjidaniclan, Hotarubi's prime concern is for her lover Yashamaru, another member of theIga Ten. Her devotion to him is so great that even the suggestion that he's come to harm is enough to send her into a feral rage. After learning of Yashamaru's murder, Hotarubi devotes herself to the war between Iga and Kōga completely, seeking the chance for revenge at any cost. Although she shares her clan's hatred for the Kōga, Hotarubi's prime concern is for her lover Yashamaru, another member of the Iga ten.  Her devotion to him is so great that even the suggestion that he's come to harm is enough to send her into reactions that range from a mere evil stare (like whenNenki Minomakes a bad joke about it) to a feral rage (when Shougen refuses to tell her if Yashamaru is alive or not, and she brutally stabs him to death). Like most of the Iga, Hotarubi considersOboroto be a completely useless leader and defers toTenzen Yakushiji's orders. In the anime, this may be tied to slight jealousy since Yashamaru once teased her for not being sweet and feminine like Oboro and a comically offended Hotarubi threw a childish tantrum at him. Like most of the Iga, Hotarubi considers Oboro to be completely useless despite her position as the clan's next leader, and defers to Yakushiji Tenzen's orders. In the anime, this may be tied to slight jealousy, since Yashamaru once teased her for not being sweet and feminine like Oboro and Hotarubi almost threw a childish tantrum at him.

characters.name: Jingorō Amayo
characters.description: Jingorō AmayoNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:Dissolves into a Semi-Liquid FormStatus:Killed byGyōbu KasumiAffiliation:Iga ClanFamily:UnknownAppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 2First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Ken UoEnglish:J. Paul SlavensImage Gallery Jingorō Amayo(雨夜 陣五郎,Amayo Jingorō) is a member of theIga Tsubagakureclan who is one of the ten ninja selected byOgento participate in the war against theKōga Manjidaniclan. Jingorō's full body and facial expressions Loathsome and cowardly at heart, Jingorō is one of the fewIga Tsubagakureninjas who specialize in assassination rather than combat, preferring to sneak up on his opponents and being quick to flee once he suffers a disadvantage. He has a huge fear of the sea and absolutely hates being on boats. He doesn't seem to be very liked by his comrades with most only interacting with him to throw him in a river when he needs water. He is also rather perverted, attempting to rapeOkoiwhen he finds her tied up in the salt shed.

characters.name: Jōsuke Udono
characters.description: Jōsuke UdonoNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:Body has the Consistency of RubberStatus:Killed byJingorō AmayoAffiliation:Kōga ManjidaniClanFamily:UnknownAppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 2First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Katsui TairaEnglish:Jeremy InmanImage Gallery Jōsuke Udono(鵜殿 丈助,Udono Jōsuke) is a member of theKōga Manjidaniclan and one of the ten ninjas selected byDanjō Kōgato participate in the war against theIga Tsubagakureclan. Jōsuke's full body and facial expressions Good-humored, a little dumb and extremely fat; Jōsuke hardly fits the traditional concept of the ninja. characters.name: Jūbei Jimushi
characters.description: Jūbei JimushiNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:Snake-like Abilities and Fortune-tellingStatus:Killed byTenzen YakushijiAffiliation:Kōga ManjidaniClanFamily:UnknownAppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 3First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Atsushi ImaruokaEnglish:Eric ValeImage Gallery Jūbei Jimushi(地虫 十兵衛,Jimushi Jūbei) is a member of theKōga Manjidaniclan and one of the ten ninjas selected byDanjō Kōgato participate in the war against theIga Tsubagakureclan. Jūbei's full body and facial expressions Jūbei is a very intelligent man who is able to stay composed in the most difficult situations. He is aware that he is at a disadvantage during combat and always keeps his hidden blade with him. Jūbei doesn't inform his clansmen of futures that do not concern him, shown when he adamantly refused to reveal to his clansmen what he had prophesied regardingGennosuke Kōga's future withOboro. He knew Gennosuke would not change his mind on the marriage so resigned himself on letting fate play out as it would.

characters.name: Kagerō
characters.description: KagerōNinja StatsGender:FemaleSpecial Ability:Poisonous BreathStatus:Killed byTenzen YakushijiAffiliation:Kōga ManjidaniClanFamily:Unnamed Mother (seen inEpisode 11)Gennosuke Kōga(Cousin)AppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 6First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Risa HayamizuEnglish:Stephanie YoungImage Gallery Kagerō(陽炎) is a member of theKōga Manjidaniclan and one of the ten ninjas selected byDanjō Kōgato participate in the war against theIga Tsubagakureclan. Kagerou's full body and facial expressions Due to the upcoming wedding ofGennosuke KōgaandOboro, Kagerō has become distraught; resulting in a jaded persona full of envy and bitterness; Kagerō's hatred for Oboro slowly beginning to consume her with some of the things she'd say often resulting in her swiftly getting reprimand byHyōma Muroga. When theKōga Manjidaniclan finally learned theHattoritruce had indeed been absolved, few were happier about the news than Kagerō who saw it as an opportunity to seek revenge on Oboro for taking what she felt should've been hers.

characters.name: Nenki Mino
characters.description: Nenki MinoNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:Hair ManipulationStatus:Killed byHyouma MurogaAffiliation:Iga ClanFamily:UnknownAppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 2First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Kenji UtsumiEnglish:Jim JohnsonImage Gallery Nenki Mino(蓑 念鬼,Mino Nenki) is a member of theIga Tsubagakureand one of the ten ninja selected byOgento participate in the war against theKouga Manjidani. Nenki's hair is a tangled, black mess which reaches just past his waist, though can be extended to be longer than his body. His entire body, except for his hands and face, are completely covered in fur. He has pointy ears and sharp teeth, giving him a rather canine appearance. He has exceptionally large eyebrows and a lot of nose hair protruding from his nose. He wears a light grey kosode with darker grey hakama. He's best friends with Hotarubi. Nenki is very self-confident and has no problem directly challenging another ninja to a fight. He seems to enjoy battle and takes pleasure in killing his opponents. He also seems to take every opportunity to show off his skills, shown when he immediately volunteers to kill Shougen and later to track down Okoi. He also seems slightly perverted, licking his lips when he first catches sight of Okoi and stripping her when he ties her up. His pride is important to him and he even takes the mission to kill Gennosuke to regain some of his pride he feels he has lost.

characters.name: Oboro
characters.description: OboroNinja StatsGender:FemaleSpecial Ability:Mystic EyesStatus:Comitted SuicideAffiliation:Iga TsubagakureClanFamily:Ogen(Grandmother)Neeya(Probable Mother)Hachirō Kōga(Son)Hibiki Iga(Daughter)AppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 1First Appearance (Anime):Episode 1Voice ActorsJapanese:Nana MizukiEnglish:Laura BaileyImage GalleryOboro(朧) is the granddaughter ofOgenand therefore the rightful princess of theIga Tsubagakureclan who is engaged toGennosuke Kōgawhere she was one of the ten ninja picked by her grandmother to represent Iga in the battle against theKōga Manjidaniclan. Neeya(Probable Mother)Hachirō Kōga(Son)Hibiki Iga(Daughter) After the death of Ogen, Oboro ascends to take leadership of the clan, but due to her passive demeanor, she soon finds that her authority was usurped byTenzen Yakushijiand she is considered a poor leader to the Iga clan. Oboro is a very kind, gentle, selfless, naive, sweet-natured and peaceful girl who can be very determined when it comes to the safety of other people and cares deeply for her clan despite being passive (accepting or allowing what happens or what others do, without active response or resistance). She is also shown to be shy and clumsy as seen inEpisode 16when she serves three cups of tea only to trip due to feeling nervous, which causes one of the tea cups to spill onGennosuke Kōga's face.

characters.name: Ogen
characters.description: OgenNinja StatsGender:FemaleSpecial Ability:Spiritual Connection with HawkStatus:Killed byDanjō KōgaAffiliation:Iga TsubagakureClanFamily:Unnamed GrandfatherOboro(Granddaughter)Hachirō Kōga(Great-Grandson)Hibiki Iga(Great-Granddaughter)AppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 1First Appearance (Anime):Episode 1Voice ActorsJapanese:Hisako KyodaMiyuki Sawashiro(Young)English:Juli EricksonJamie Marchi(Young)Image GalleryOgen(お幻) is the leader ofIga Tsubagakureand the grandmother ofOborowho allows Oboro to become engaged toDanjō Kōga's grandsonGennosuke Kōgain order to bring a truce between the clans. Oboro(Granddaughter)Hachirō Kōga(Great-Grandson)Hibiki Iga(Great-Granddaughter) Ogen is an old lady with a pointy nose and a very wrinkled face. She has long, white hair which she keeps held up in a bun. She wears a dark purple kimono with a green sash wrapped around her waist. Ogen was once cheery and positive, happy to be engaged toDanjō Kōga. However, she later changed and became consumed with revenge and hatred, unable to forgive Danjō or the Kōga for what they had done. She was happy upon being given the chance to break the peace treaty, although seemed slightly sad about what it would do toOboro. Ogen seemed to have still wanted peace between the clans when she allowed Oboro to marryGennosuke Kōga, although it is suggested in the manga, it was due to Oboro being unable to fight. She cried over Danjō's death, hinting she may have forgiven him for his betrayal.

characters.name: Okoi
characters.description: OkoiNinja StatsGender:FemaleSpecial Ability:Blood AbsorptionStatus:Killed byNenki MinoAffiliation:Kōga ManjidaniClanFamily:Saemon Kisaragi(Older Brother)AppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 7First Appearance (Anime):Episode 5Voice ActorsJapanese:Haruka KimuraEnglish:Monica RialImage Gallery Okoi(お胡夷,Okoi) is a member of theKōga Manjidaniclan who is one of the ten ninjas selected byDanjō Kōgato participate in the war against theIga Tsubagakureclan and the younger sister of fellow Kōga ninjaSaemon Kisaragi. Okoi is a young woman with shoulder-length brown hair that she keeps tied up in a ponytail, brown eyes and she has very large lips and a muscular and quite a well-endowed frame, which are very prominent in the manga version. Tomboyish and energetic, Okoi represents the popular concept of the kunoichi whileAkeginuandKagerōboth embody the more historically traditional version. Although a capable fighter, Okoi is not opposed to using her "ample assets" to lure men into a state of false security if she has to. She is also a very sociable person, making friends easily and it is said not evenGennosuke Kōgawould get mad at her. Despite her friendly nature, she does sometimes get angry and is shown to rough people up if the situation calls for it, such as whenJōsuke Udonoruined her hunting trip.

characters.name: Renbu Kasumi
characters.description: Renbu KasumiNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:UnknownStatus:Killed by Iga NinjasAffiliation:Kouga ClanFamily:Gyōbu Kasumi(Son)AppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):N/AFirst Appearance (Anime):Episode 1Voice ActorsJapanese:MugihitoEnglish:Daniel PenzImage Gallery Renbu Kasumi(霞 蓮武,Kasumi Renbu) is the father ofGyōbu Kasumiwho appears only in the anime. Under the command of theKōgaelder, Renbu was ordered to hunt down and eliminate anyIgawho escapedNobunaga Oda's assault, but was stopped by LordDanjō Kōgawhen he attempted to killOgenin the forests behind Tsubagakure. Despite being a ruthless combatant, Renbu's deepest desire was for his son to live a life free of conflict and bloodshed and eventually became a supporter of Danjou's desire to build a lasting peace with the Iga. Sent by Danjou to meet with them as a representative, Renbu and his companions were ambushed by an Iga squad who sought revenge for the attack he led on their clan. Renbu was mortally wounded during the fight and his final words to Gyoubu before he died was to never pity any ninja.

Renbu was mortally wounded during the fight and his final words to Gyoubu before he died was to never pity any ninja.

characters.name: Rui
characters.description: RuiNinja StatsGender:FemaleSpecial Ability:ButterflyStatus:Deceased (Alive in another world)Affiliation:Iga ClanAppearancesFirst Appearance (Anime):Episode 1Voice ActorsJapanese:Reina UedaEnglish:Jeannie TiradoImage GalleryRui(涙) is one of the main characters ofBasilisk ~Ōka Ninpō Chō~.She is a young female ninja who uses the Butterfly technique to control the passions of men. Rui is a young girl with brown-pinkish hair that has bangs hanging on the left side, violet eyes and a mole on her neck. She wears a sleeveless light colored kimono where she ties it with a purple sash and she wears a black eye-patch on her left eye. Rui is a very kind girl and rather quiet. Although she is quite unlikeUtsutsuandHachisu, she can stand up for herself in most situations.

characters.name: Rōsai Azuki
characters.description: Rōsai AzukiNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:Extendable LimbsStatus:Killed byOkoiAffiliation:Iga ClanFamily:UnknownAppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 2First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Takeshi AonoEnglish:R. Bruce ElliottImage Gallery Rōsai Azuki(小豆 蠟斎,Azuki Rōsai) is a member of theIga Tsubagakureand one of the ten ninja picked byOgento participate in the war against theKouga. He's the second oldest member afterTenzen. Rōsai's a short, elderly man with a large, gourd-shaped head with a small tuft of white hair on the top as well as a long beard, a pointed nose and sharp, beady eyes. He is the shortest of the Iga ninja and wears a yellow shirt with a red vest over it, a dull blue hakama and a pair of sandals on his feet. Rōsai has a very short temper (likely as a result of his short stature) and holds great animosity for the Kouga clan, even claiming his head was once normal sized but became swollen from all the hatred he felt towards them [Kouga] for the part they played inNobunaga's assault on Iga. He also dislikes being teased or mocked by others about anything, particularly his age or height, and is the kind of person to hold grudges for entire decades.

characters.name: Saemon Kisaragi
characters.description: Saemon KisaragiNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:TransformationStatus:Killed byTenzen YakushijiAffiliation:Kōga ManjidaniClanFamily:Okoi(Younger Sister)AppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 6First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Yoji UedaEnglish:Jason LiebrechtImage Gallery Saemon Kisaragi(如月 左衛門,Kisaragi Saemon) is a member of theKōga Manjidaniclan who is one of the ten ninjas selected byDanjō Kōgato participate in the war against theIga Tsubagakureclan and the older brother of fellow Kōga ninjaOkoi. Saemon has black hair that he keeps back in a small topknot and he has a rather unremarkable face with his only distinguishing features being his slightly narrow eyes. Saemon is perhaps Basilisk's most complex character. Cool and aloof, he conducts himself in both war and peace with an almost professional sense of detachment. Following Okoi's brutal capture, interrogation and terrifying death at the Iga's hands; Saemon throws himself whole-heartedly into the war between Kōga and Iga, viewing victory for his clan and revenge for his sister as one and the same. To that end, Saemon will use any method necessary to physically and mentally break the remaining Iga ten. But after the fight is over and his enemy is dead, Saemon will always apologize to his slain opponents with the hope that in death they might know the peace they were denied in life. He seems to be very close friends with bothGyōbu KasumiandKagerō.

He reveals that his power originally consists in seducing women. Unamed father (mentioned) As a young boy, he discovered his ability to shut the insects, and later to control them. His father was revealed to have the same affinity with insects.

characters.name: Shikibu Kōra
characters.description:
Shikibu KōraNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:Rhino ArmorStatus:Deceased (Alive in another world)Affiliation:Kouga ClanVoice ActorsJapanese:Fukushi OchiaiEnglish:Tyson RinehartImage GalleryShikibu Kōra(甲羅式部, Kōra Shikibu) is one of the main characters ofBasilisk ~Ōka Ninpō Chō~.  A strong young male ninja who uses body armor to bolster his hand-to-hand technique.
Shikibu displays colossal brute force on account of an unfortunate condition. Since he was born, his muscles constantly grew, threatening his very life as his skin could not restrain his muscle's expansion.
In order to survive in his youth, Buddhist monks wrapped him in a suit of bandages, giving him the appearance of a mummy.
Later he changed the bandages for armor designed byGorone Negorothat keeps constant pressure on his body to inhibit his expansion.

characters.name: Shōgen Kazamachi
characters.description: Shōgen KazamachiNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:Spider-like AbilitiesStatus:Killed byHotarubiAffiliation:Kōga ManjidaniClanFamily:Unnamed RelativeAppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 1First Appearance (Anime):Episode 1Voice ActorsJapanese:Ryuzaku ChiziwaEnglish:Chris CasonImage GalleryShōgen Kazamachi(風待 将監,Kazamachi Shōgen) is a member of theKōga Manjidaniclan who is one of the ten ninjas selected byDanjouto participate in the war against theIga. Shōgen has one of the most unique appearances of all the ninja with a bulbous hunchback, oversized hands and feet and long gangly limbs. He also has a long tongue, which sticks through the gaps where his front teeth should be. His black hair is short and messy, framing the entire outside of his face. His eyes are a blood red color. He has six red dots on his head along with what appears to be a scar. His nose is also rather flat. He wears a sleeveless black vest with a red spider imprinted on the back, a belt, black wristbands and black knee-length hakama. He wears traditional sandals and ties black fabric round his ankles. In his first appearance, he is seen carrying a sword horizontally across his lower back. Shōgen is a rather sadistic man who enjoys taunting his opponents before killing them. He also doesnt seem to listen to warnings or advice, shown when he ignoresJūbei Jimushi's warning that something bad will happen when he is near water. Instead he sets out to try and prove them wrong. He is confident in his abilities and didn't appear worried when facing four Iga ninjas at once, even believing he could kill them all. Shōgen didn't appear to be afraid of dying as he showed no hesitation at provokingHotarubiwhen she had a knife against his throat.

characters.name: Tenzen Yakushiji
characters.description: Tenzen YakushijiNinja StatsGender:MaleSpecial Ability:Regeneration/ImmortalityStatus:Killed byOboroAffiliation:Iga ClanFamily:Unnamed FatherUnnamed MotherTwin BrotherAppearancesFirst Appearance (Manga):Chapter 2First Appearance (Anime):Episode 2Voice ActorsJapanese:Show HayamiEnglish:Mark StoddardImage GalleryTenzen Yakushiji(薬師寺 天膳,Yakushiji Tenzen) is the main antagonist of theanimeandmangaseries. He is a member of theIga Tsubagakureclan and one of the ten ninja picked byOgento participate in the war against theKōga Manjidaniclan where he is second-in-command after Ogen and he is able to wrestle control of the Iga away fromOborofollowing Ogen's death to become Iga's de facto leader. Tenzen's full body and facial expressions Tenzen is a rather tall man with chest-length black hair that he sweeps back leaving him with no fringe with two of his side locks curling forward that resemble horns and give him a devilish appearance which is further accented by his upward growing eyebrows, there is an ever-present shadow over his eyes and his ears possess a small growth that is actually the closed eyes of ademonic symbiotethat inhabits his body. Although his initial impression is of a pragmatic fighter concerned solely for the honor and future of his clan, Tenzen is actually a sadistic and mendacious individual who revels in conflict and bloodshed where he fights with a brutal and ruthless tenacity and won't hesitate to involve innocent bystanders to guarantee a victory. He is also depraved, wanting to takeOboroas his wife to become the true lord of Tsubagakure, even if he has to rape her to do so, which he attempts at least twice over the course of the series, as well as attempting to rapeKagerō.

characters.name: Tenzen's Father
characters.description: Tenzen's FatherBackground/AllianceJapanese name:UnknownGender:MaleStatus:DeceasedAffiliation:Kouga ClanOccupation:N/AFamily:Tenzen(Son)WifeAppearancesManga Debut:N/AAnime Debut:Episode 23Voice ActorsJapanese:N/AEnglish:N/AImage Gallery Tenzen's father had forcefully cut his son out of his dying mother's womb. He had raised his son to be a Kouga, yet Tenzen somehow switched his affiliation to Iga when he got older. In the flashback, he is seen standing beside her while she gazes at him lovingly. He appears to be uneasy and clenches his teeth moments before his lover looks shocked to see several Kouga ninja standing behind him, carrying swords. As she is brutually attacked, he looks away. He is soon seen being handed a sword, and as she desperately reaches out for him, he stabs her with a crazed and mournful expression on his face. Tenzen's father is a young man with dark hair (possibly brown) that he keeps in a high ponytail. His bangs fall over his forehead and he has dark eyes. He wears a dark kosode and hakama.
